arts.ttl: Liverpool & Real Madrid linked - Could Jamal Musiala leave Bayern Munich next season?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are under pressure to reach a number of necessary goals this season. First and foremost, new head coach Vincent Kompany must regain control in the Bundesliga and...

arts.ttl: In-House Real Madrid 24-25 Home Kit Released, Looks Like a Fake
arts.sum: Real Madrid has released a budget-friendly in-house version of its 24-25 home kit, but we are not sure if this will go well with anyone who gets it.

arts.ttl: Take Kubo: “Real Madrid’s three attackers play the same position, which is why they are struggling”
arts.sum: Real Sociedad winger Takefusa Kubo spoke about Real Madrid in a recent interview ahead of Real Madrid’s game against his current club. Kubo spoke about Real Madrid in a recent interview.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid postpone hosting of events and concerts at the Santiago Bernabeu
arts.sum: Real Madrid have announced that they are temporarily rescheduling their agenda of events and concerts at the Santiago Bernabeu stadium. F. communicates that it has decided to temporarily reschedule its agenda of events and concerts at the Santiago Bernabéu stadium.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s possible line-up vs Real Sociedad: why isn’t Bellingham playing?
arts.sum: In defence, there had been question marks over whether or not Dani Carvajal and Éder Militão would start at Reale Arena; the former played 180 minutes for Spain during international week, while the latter picked up a knock in a Brazil training session. In the absence of Bellingham, Tchouaméni and Camavinga, as well as fellow injured midfielder Dani Ceballos, the keys to the engine room will be handed to Luka Modric, who has so far started only one game this season - the 1-1 draw away to Las Palmas at the end of August.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: We Put The Entire Real Madrid Squad In A Tier List
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Angelo Valdes (Mr Factous, Will), go through the entire Real Madrid squad and discuss who to keep, sell, and loan. It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: How Real Madrid players performed during the September international break
arts.sum: 10 members of the Real Madrid squad were on senior international duty this past week, with some fairing better than others in the games with their national teams. Despite earning himself a Yashin Trophy nomination during the international break, Andriy Lunin didn't play a single minute of football for his national team Ukraine.

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Sociedad vs. Real Madrid injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's La Liga clash between Real Sociedad and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Zaragoza ban Barcelona & Real Madrid from attending club’s training ground
arts.sum: La Liga 2 outfit Real Zaragoza have this week taken drastic measures, in a bid to fight back against Spanish football’s leading clubs. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, citing Heraldo…

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad boss Imanol provides Mikel Oyarzabal injury update before Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Sociedad head coach Imanol has on Friday provided an update on the wellbeing of star attacker Mikel Oyarzabal. Frontman Oyarzabal, for his part, set alarm bells ringing back in…
